tests.name: slugify produces chg-<date>-<slug> format
slugify strips special characters
slugify lowercases the title
slugify truncates slug to 40 chars
slugify trims trailing dashes from slug
slugify collapses multiple consecutive spaces into a single dash
slugify trims leading and trailing whitespace before slug conversion

detectAffectedArtifacts includes PRD.md for spec-change type even without keyword matches

detectAffectedArtifacts adds docs/adrs/ for non-adr type when title has 'architecture' keyword (>3 chars)
detectAffectedArtifacts short words (≤3 chars) are excluded from keyword matching
detectAffectedArtifacts deduplicates artifacts

detectRequiredGates includes l2-* gates from active dir
detectRequiredGates includes contract-testing-required gate
detectRequiredGates adds schema gates for breaking-api type
detectRequiredGates adds contract gates when breaking=true
detectRequiredGates does not duplicate gates

listChangesHandler lists all changes grouped by status

listChangesHandler never marks verified changes as stale regardless of age

listChangesHandler shows gate count for change with required_gates
listChangesHandler marks stale open changes with warning indicator

listChangesHandler marks a change created 8 days ago as stale
score 0 — no tests returns score 0 when no test files exist
score 0 — no tests returns score 2 when only test files exist (no source to miss)
score 1 — tests exist but coverage or pass is insufficient returns score 1 when tests fail even with good coverage
score 1 — tests exist but coverage or pass is insufficient returns score 1 when coverage is below 80%
score 1 — tests exist but coverage or pass is insufficient includes missing count in evidence
score 2 — tests pass and coverage ≥ 80% returns score 2 when all tests pass and no missing files
score 2 — tests pass and coverage ≥ 80% returns score 2 when missing ≤ 20% of source modules
score 2 — tests pass and coverage ≥ 80% returns score 2 when exactly 20% missing (boundary — ≤ not <)
score 2 — tests pass and coverage ≥ 80% returns score 1 when exactly 21% missing
evidence content evidence[0] is test-file count when score is 1 (not empty array)
evidence content coveredPct uses (1 - missingPct), not (1 + missingPct)
evidence content test files are excluded from sourceCount (not double-counted as source)
score 0 — no layers returns score 0 when src is empty
score 1 — service layer only returns score 1 with src/services/
score 1 — service layer only returns score 1 with src/tools/ (CLI pattern)
score 1 — service layer only returns score 1 with src/handlers/
score 2 — service + repository layers returns score 2 with src/services/ + src/repositories/
score 2 — service + repository layers returns score 2 with src/tools/ + src/registry/ (MCP pattern)
score 2 — service + repository layers reports interface files in evidence when present
score 2 — service + repository layers notes partial credit when no interface files
score 2 — service + repository layers works without src/ — root-level services/
interface detection — singular directory names detects interface/ (singular) as interface layer
interface detection — singular directory names detects contract/ (singular) as interface layer
interface detection — singular directory names detects port/ (singular) as interface layer
interface detection — singular directory names detects type/ (singular) as interface layer
interface detection — singular directory names non-source file matching interface dir does not count
score 0 — evidence content evidence describes missing layers

collectDbViolations skips comment without leading space

constants MIN_INSTRUCTION_FILE_LINES is 40
constants MIN_KEYWORD_HITS is 3
constants DB_CALL_PATTERNS is non-empty
constants ROUTE_DIRS includes routes and controllers
score 0 — no instruction file returns score 0 when directory is empty
score 1 — file found but stub returns score 1 for CLAUDE.md with fewer than MIN lines
score 1 — file found but stub returns score 1 for CLAUDE.md with enough lines but too few keywords
score 1 — file found but stub returns score 1 for .clinerules stub
score 1 — file found but stub returns score 1 for .windsurfrules stub
score 1 — file found but stub returns score 1 for CONVENTIONS.md stub
score 2 — substantive instruction file returns score 2 for CLAUDE.md with enough lines and keywords
score 2 — substantive instruction file returns score 2 for copilot-instructions.md
score 2 — substantive instruction file prefers CLAUDE.md when multiple instruction files exist
score 2 — substantive instruction file evidence line reports correct non-empty line count
score 2 — substantive instruction file returns score 2 when file has exactly MIN_INSTRUCTION_FILE_LINES non-empty lines
score 2 — substantive instruction file blank lines are excluded from non-empty line count
score 1 — missing keywords evidence lists specific missing keywords in evidence
parseCliArgs command extraction extracts command from first argument
parseCliArgs command extraction defaults to 'serve' when no arguments given
parseCliArgs command extraction returns empty positional and flags for a bare command
parseCliArgs positional arguments collects positional args before flags
parseCliArgs positional arguments collects multiple positional args
parseCliArgs positional arguments non-flag arg after a value-flag is consumed as the flag's value, not positional
parseCliArgs boolean flags parses --flag alone as true
parseCliArgs boolean flags parses --no-flag as false
parseCliArgs boolean flags parses multiple boolean flags
parseCliArgs value flags parses --flag value as array with one element
parseCliArgs value flags parses --flag val1 val2 as array
parseCliArgs value flags stops collecting values at the next --flag
parseCliArgs value flags parses multiple value flags independently
parseCliArgs mixed input bare boolean flag followed by positional-style value consumes value as flag value
parseCliArgs mixed input handles all three types together
str helper returns first element of an array flag
str helper returns first element when array has multiple values
str helper returns undefined for boolean flag
str helper returns undefined for missing flag
arr helper returns array for array flag
arr helper returns undefined for boolean flag
arr helper returns undefined for missing flag
arr helper returns undefined for empty array
bool helper returns true for boolean true flag
bool helper returns false for boolean false flag (--no-*)
bool helper returns defaultVal when flag is absent
bool helper returns defaultVal when flag is an array (not boolean)
scoreBounded returns score 2 with no violations
scoreBounded returns score 1 for 1 violation
scoreBounded returns score 1 for 2 violations
scoreBounded returns score 0 for 3 violations
scoreBounded returns score 0 for many violations
scoreBounded includes violation details in score 1 evidence
scoreBounded caps evidence at 5 violations for score 0, appends 'and N more'
scoreBounded does not append 'more' when exactly 5 violations
